decision: Fallback to FP16 until onnx2tf INT8 conversion quality is resolved
notes: Validation used stratified 20 images/class. TF oneDNN disabled (TF_ENABLE_ONEDNN_OPTS=0). INT8 produced by onnx2tf shows large accuracy regression similar to ShuffleNetV2 runs. See notebooks/ResNet18Onnx.ipynb for full run and tensor correspondence report.
